missing.text: Captain... the ship's cat is not at its post. It was last seen regarding the cargo bay with intent. We have two theories: expedition, or nap of unusual ambition. Mount a search, or trust the cat?

search.text: Search underway... movement in the aft compartment. It's the cat. It has assembled a small collection: one sock, two bottle caps, and something that glints. Confiscate the hoard, or knight the collection?

knighted.text: The hoard is hereby the Royal Treasury of the Aft Kingdom. The cat has accepted the title of Keeper. The glinting object remains unidentified. The cat's eyes say: mine. All is right aboard, Captain.

confiscated.text: Confiscation attempted. Results: one sock recovered, dignity losses on both sides, and the glinting object has vanished along with the cat. This isn't over, Captain. The cat's tail said so.

trust.text: Trust extended. Update from aft: the cat has returned to its post, betraying nothing, carrying the faint air of a completed mission. Whatever happened back there is between the cat and history. Wise call, Captain.
